versions.description: 7 Days to Die helper commands that tell players how many in-game days remain until the next blood moon/horde night using live server time.
versions.configSchema: {"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","type":"object","properties":{"hordeIntervalDays":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"default":7,"description":"How often blood moon/horde night happens, in in-game days. Vanilla is every 7 days."},"firstHordeDay":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"default":7,"description":"The first blood moon day in the cycle. Vanilla is day 7."},"timeConsoleCommand":{"type":"string","default":"gettime","maxLength":80,"description":"Console command used to read current 7D2D game time. The output must include the current day, such as 'Day 12'."},"responseTemplate":{"type":"string","default":"Blood moon: Day {nextHordeDay}. Current day: {currentDay}. {daysUntilText}.","maxLength":300,"description":"Player response template. Supports {currentDay}, {nextHordeDay}, {daysUntil}, {daysUntilText}, {interval}, {firstHordeDay}, and {source}."},"hordeTodayText":{"type":"string","default":"Blood moon is tonight","maxLength":120,"description":"Text used for {daysUntilText} when the next horde day is today."},"daysUntilText":{"type":"string","default":"{daysUntil} day(s) remaining","maxLength":120,"description":"Text used for {daysUntilText} when the horde is in the future. Supports {daysUntil}."},"parseErrorMessage":{"type":"string","default":"I couldn't read the current game day. Ask an admin to check the blood-moon-countdown module config and timeConsoleCommand.","maxLength":300,"description":"Player-facing message when console time parsing fails."},"includeConsoleOutputInLogs":{"type":"boolean","default":true,"description":"Log the raw console output when parsing fails. Useful while tuning timeConsoleCommand."}},"required":[],"additionalProperties":false}

commands.name: bloodmoon
commands.description: Show how many in-game days remain until the next blood moon/horde night.
commands.helpText: Usage: /bloodmoon — shows current day, next horde day, and days remaining.

commands.name: day7
commands.helpText: Usage: /day7 — shows how many days remain until the next blood moon/horde night.

functions.name: blood-moon-helpers
